'''dhatuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smallholder|smallholder]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smallholder|smallholder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhatuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhætichith|dhætichith]] || [[word:dhætichij|dhætichij]] || [[word:dhætichish|dhætichish]] || [[word:dhætichi|dhætichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhatutuchuth|dhatutuchuth]] || [[word:dhatutuchuj|dhatutuchuj]] || [[word:dhatutuchush|dhatutuchush]] || [[word:dhatutuchu|dhatutuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhatuchuth|dhatuchuth]] || [[word:dhatuchuj|dhatuchuj]] || [[word:dhatuchush|dhatuchush]] || [[word:dhatuchu|dhatuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhatufchuth|dhatufchuth]] || [[word:dhatufchuj|dhatufchuj]] || [[word:dhatufchush|dhatufchush]] || [[word:dhatufchuf|dhatufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhatuchuthu|dhatuchuthu]] || [[word:dhatuchuju|dhatuchuju]] || [[word:dhatuchushu|dhatuchushu]] || [[word:dhatuchuku|dhatuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhatuchuth|dhatuchuth]] || [[word:dhatuchuj|dhatuchuj]] || [[word:dhatuchush|dhatuchush]] || [[word:dhatuchu|dhatuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhatuchuthul|dhatuchuthul]] || [[word:dhatuchujul|dhatuchujul]] || [[word:dhatuchushul|dhatuchushul]] || [[word:dhatuchukul|dhatuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhatuchuthuthu|dhatuchuthuthu]] || [[word:dhatuchujuju|dhatuchujuju]] || [[word:dhatuchushushu|dhatuchushushu]] || [[word:dhatuchuku|dhatuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhatuchuthun|dhatuchuthun]] || [[word:dhatuchujun|dhatuchujun]] || [[word:dhatuchushun|dhatuchushun]] || [[word:dhatuchukun|dhatuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhatuchuthuoro|dhatuchuthuoro]] || [[word:dhatuchujuoro|dhatuchujuoro]] || [[word:dhatuchushuoro|dhatuchushuoro]] || [[word:dhatuchukuoro|dhatuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
